title: Complexity MoE v4: Token-Routed I64 + PID + CUDA Scatter + Int6 (26.5M params)
body:
## Summary

Full-stack MoE architecture from [Complexity Framework](https://github.com/Complexity-ML/complexity-framework) + [vllm-i64](https://github.com/Complexity-ML/vllm-i64):

- **Token-Routed MoE** — 4 SwiGLU experts, hybrid routing (modulo base + learned override)
- **PID Dynamics** — INL mu traverses all 11 layers, tight clamping [0.5, 1.5]
- **CUDA scatter dispatch** — real scatter+gather from vllm-i64 (no wasted compute)
- **Int6 quantization + zstd-22** compression
- **SWA** — fp32 checkpoint averaging
- **Cosine Warm Restarts** (SGDR) LR schedule
- **Sliding window eval** (stride=64, window=2048)

26.5M params, estimated ~14.2MB with int6+zstd.

Supersedes #224.

## Status
⏳ Awaiting RunPod compute credits for val_bpb.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
